designSystem.style: Dark ocean-inspired UI with deep navy backgrounds, sky-blue and emerald accents, wave-themed micro-animations, and a calm yet purposeful aesthetic designed to reduce cognitive load

screens: Tide (Home) - Dashboard with tide meter showing interruption level, daily stats, recent interruptions with urgency indicators, and quick action buttons
Capture - Multi-mode input (type/voice/photo) for fast thought dumping, recent captures list with sort status, success feedback animation
Recovery Mode - 3-step guided prompts (what were you doing / what interrupted / what counts as progress) with suggestion chips, progress bar, and auto-generated restart plan
Actions - Filtered task list (Now/Waiting/Later) with effort tags, context icons, time estimates, and tap-to-complete interactions
Schedule - Reality-aware timeline with energy curve visualization, color-coded time blocks by type, and current-block highlight
